user.title: Daikin One+ Setup
user.description: Enter your Daikin One+ integrator token. You can obtain this from the Daikin One+ developer portal.

abort.already_configured: This Daikin One+ account is already configured.

init.description: Configure the Daikin One+ integration settings.
